name: prixmaviz-local
description: Local marketplace for the PrixmaViz Claude Code plugin (stdio shim forwarding to a hosted or self-hosted PrixmaViz server).

plugins.name: prixmaviz
plugins.description: AI-native diagram tool — 29+ engines (incl. Microsoft Visio .vsdx round-trip), annotations, infinite canvas. Renders to a browser tab via the hosted service or your own self-hosted PrixmaViz server.
